records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Disorganized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Disorganizing (?).]

defs: To destroy the organic structure or regular system of (a government, a society, a party, etc.); to break up (what is organized); to throw into utter disorder; to disarrange.
quotes: Lyford . . . attempted to disorganize the church.
